name: Chinese Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat diagonally crosswise into 1/4 inch thick, 2 wide strips.
2. Trim away any fat or gristle.
3. Transfer the meat to a non-metallic pan.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and marinate for 24 hours.
5. Arrange the meat on racks and let it dry at cool room temperature overnight (do not refrigerate).
6. Preheat the oven to 225°F.
7. Line two large baking sheets with foil and set wire racks on top.
8. Arrange the meat on the racks in a single layer.
9. Bake for 15 minutes.
10. Reduce the heat to 175°F and continue drying the meat another 4 hours or more.
11. Leave the meat on the racks to cool, then continue drying for several hours before bagging it.
